types: A smuggler's cargo of forbidden texts vanishes from the Obsidian Lotus' docks—trace the leak before the Serpent Choir sanctions the shipment.
The Iron Fang Consortium demands a private audience with a disgraced ex-Adventurer Guild member in the Markets Infinite; discretion is non-negotiable.
A Patchwork Saint's clinic is being blackmailed by a cult of the Brother Thane's Cult—retrieve incriminating relics from the Sanctum Quarter.
A merchant's daughter in the Guild Spires has vanished; the Wardens of Ash suspect her father's dealings with the Glass Sigil.
The Adventurers Guild needs a courier to deliver a cursed artifact to the Wizards Tower, but the package must never be opened.
Lady Cerys Valemont's arena rival has stolen a sacred relic from the Serpent Choir—recover it before the Argent Blades declare war.
A Guild of Ashen Scrolls archivist is missing, and their last known location is a derelict tavern in the Outer Wall's underbelly.
The Tower Authority wants a spy embedded in the Iron Fang's relic trafficking ring—but the target is a former Warden of Ash.
A missing person in the Warrens is linked to the Obsidian Lotus' black market; their last known contact was a Glass Sigil archivist.
The Adventurers Guild is offering a bounty for a smuggled relic from the Grand Forum—retrieve it before the Serpent Choir claims it as a divine contract.
